title: Dahmer's Delight
description: Farmer's Delight addon that adds cannibalism
body:
# Note: No updates are planned from this point on (31/03/25), I will no longer make any content updates or update the mod to newer versions of the game, I may however fix bugs if reported or accept new translations.

**Dahmer's Delight is Minecraft Mod and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) addon that adds cannibalism.**

*NOTE: I'm confused how this has become my most downloaded project.*

This mod allows you to make burgers out of villagers, or your friends. For maximum friendship loss, install on a hardcore server.

To harvest meat from a villager, simply use any knife from the Farmer's Delight mod to kill it.

You can find all crafting recipes using [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei). (Sadly, JEI cannot be used as Farmer's Delight does not support it)
